<?php declare(strict_types = 1); /* * This file is part of PharIo\Manifest. * * Copyright (c) Arne Blankerts <arne@blankerts.de>, Sebastian Heuer <sebastian@phpeople.de>, Sebastian Bergmann <sebastian@phpunit.de> and contributors * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. * */ namespace PharIo\Manifest; use PharIo\Version\Version; class BundledComponent { /** @var string */ private $name; /** @var Version */ private $version; public function __construct(string $name, Version $version) { $this->name = $name; $this->version = $version; } public function getName(): string { return $this->name; } public function getVersion(): Version { return $this->version; } }
